positive: Minimalist celestial forest composition, featuring stylized glowing bioluminescent flora and fauna silhouettes (foxes, deer, owls) set against a deep indigo and nebula purple gradient background. The primary subject is a majestic, stylized lunar cycle composition framing a stylized crescent moon and scattered star clusters. High contrast, deep shadows, clean lines, vector-art quality, suitable for screen printing on dark apparel. Dreamy, ethereal, mysterious, whimsical, symmetrical, full-body print layout, volumetric light sourcing, ultra-detailed, 8k resolution.
negative: blurry, low quality, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, gradient gradients, poor composition
